cards.front: What is the primary goal of Exploratory Data Analysis?
cards.back: To summarize and describe the main features of the data

cards.front: What is a scatter plot used for in Exploratory Data Analysis?
cards.back: To visualize the relationship between two continuous variables

cards.front: What is the purpose of calculating the mean and standard deviation?
cards.back: To describe the central tendency and variability of a dataset

cards.front: What is a histogram used for in Exploratory Data Analysis?
cards.back: To visualize the distribution of a single continuous variable

cards.front: What is the difference between a correlation coefficient and a covariance?
cards.back: A correlation coefficient measures the strength of the linear relationship, while a covariance measures the amount of variation
